title: Groovy music video filmed in Mossel Bay
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS AND VIDEO - A music video...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery\n Video","html":"Gallery\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS AND VIDEO - A music video for the band Droomsindroom was filmed in Mossel Bay and the video was released last week.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS AND VIDEO - A music video for the band Droomsindroom was filmed in Mossel Bay and the video was released last week."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"VIDEO: See the video here","html":"VIDEO: See the video here "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It features the two brothers who make up the band, Kirsten and Kyle Schlebusch and a “surfer girl”, Chanel Shaw, who was born and bred in Mossel Bay.","html":"It features the two brothers who make up the band, Kirsten and Kyle Schlebusch and a “surfer girl”, Chanel Shaw, who was born and bred in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The song is called Good Girl."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The video starts with the two brothers sitting in a car at the beach, saying how much they like Mossel Bay and how good it would be if there were some surfers around.","html":"The video starts with the two brothers sitting in a car at the beach, saying how much they like Mossel Bay and how good it would be if there were some surfers around."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"See a gallery here: Groovy music video filmed in Mossel Bay","html":"See a gallery here: Groovy music video filmed in Mossel Bay"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They are delighted when a red VW Beetle turns up and a young, blonde lady surfer gets out.","html":"They are delighted when a red VW Beetle turns up and a young, blonde lady surfer gets out."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The song is an easy to listen to, cheerful ditty with a good beat.","html":"The song is an easy to listen to, cheerful ditty with a good beat."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Chanel is probably the best choice for the video, which features Dias Beach, The Point area including the St Blaize lighthouse and cave and a coffee shop in Marsh Street."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She moved through the ranks of lifesaving in Mossel Bay, starting off as a Nipper and is excellent at watersports.","html":"She moved through the ranks of lifesaving in Mossel Bay, starting off as a Nipper and is excellent at watersports."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She is currently studying in Cape Town.","html":"She is currently studying in Cape Town."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Lifesaving"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Mossel Bay Surf Lifesaving Club premises can clearly be seen at Dias Beach in the video.","html":"The Mossel Bay Surf Lifesaving Club premises can clearly be seen at Dias Beach in the video."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Chanel breezes through the video with aplomb, looking confident and distinctly out of the two men's league.","html":"Chanel breezes through the video with aplomb, looking confident and distinctly out of the two men's league."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She even surfs beautifully in the video.","html":"She even surfs beautifully in the video."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Luc Prinsloo of WayOut Studios was the cinematographer.","html":"Luc Prinsloo of WayOut Studios was the cinematographer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Caitlin Strydom was the director and the camera assistants were Christiaan Stopforth and Nelis du Plessis.","html":"Caitlin Strydom was the director and the camera assistants were Christiaan Stopforth and Nelis du Plessis."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"There is an element of humour, with the two brothers goofing off and playing a ukulele."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Droomsindroom, of Pretoria, put a post on social media and Mossel Bay's WayOut Studios saw it and offered to shoot the music video for the band for free.","html":"Droomsindroom, of Pretoria, put a post on social media and Mossel Bay's WayOut Studios saw it and offered to shoot the music video for the band for free."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Prinsloo said: “We spent two days filming the video.”","html":"Prinsloo said: “We spent two days filming the video.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Droomsindroom made their debut in 2022, with their hit single, Hey Sonneblom. The brothers released their first album in September 2022, named Aansteeklik, and it consists of five tracks.","html":"Droomsindroom made their debut in 2022, with their hit single, Hey Sonneblom. The brothers released their first album in September 2022, named Aansteeklik, and it consists of five tracks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Groovy music video filmed in Mossel Bay
